title: Ultimate Performance
description: Simple Forge modpack that attempting to enhancing your Minecraft performance!
body:
## About Ultimate Performance is a simple Forge Modpack that can help your Minecraft to reach more FPS, less Stutter/Lag Spike, improve World Loading Times, Game Startup Times, And more.
## How to Install? Please follow official Modrinth documentation above (or [click here](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/)). ## Comparison ### Hardware Tested on **HP Laptop 15s-e2000** - AMD Ryzen 5 5500U, 16GB RAM, Radeon Graphic(On Board) ### Software Minecraft 1.19.2 with Java [Azul Zulu](https://www.azul.com/downloads/?package=jre#zulu) 17.0.6+10(LTS) JRE, 4GB of RAM Allocated, ZGC Garbage Collector **NOTE**: Results is vary, Depending on your Hardware, OS, Java Runtime, Allocated Memory, And more... | Test | Results
(Vanilla) | Results
(Ultimate Performance) | |---:|:---:|:---:| | Game Launching Time
NOTE: measuring from start to the Main Menu| 33 Secs | 18 Secs| | Creating a New World | 46 Secs | 19 Secs | | Join a existing World | 6 Secs | 3-4 Secs | ## Changing your Java runtime and JVM flags (Advanced) You only need these two flags for modern versions of Java. ``` -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational ``` Learn more here https://exa.y2k.diy/garden/jvm-args/ ## Mods List
Click Me! * [Canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/canary) by [AbdElAziz](https://modrinth.com/user/AbdElAziz) * [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen) * [Does Potato Tick](https://modrinth.com/mod/does-potato-tick) by [Kasualix](https://modrinth.com/user/Kasualix) * [Entity Collision FPS Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-collision-fps-fix) by [CorgiTaco](https://modrinth.com/user/CorgiTaco) * [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) * [Fastload](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) by [StockiesLad](https://modrinth.com/user/StockiesLad) * [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811) * [ImmediatelyFast Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast-reforged) by [CCr4ft3r](https://modrinth.com/user/CCr4ft3r) * [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/plugin/lmd) by [frikinjay](https://modrinth.com/user/frikinjay) * [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) by [fxmorin](https://modrinth.com/user/fxmorin) * [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) by [embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt) * [Reforgium](https://modrinth.com/mod/reforgium) by [Asek3](https://modrinth.com/user/Asek3) * [Rhodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhodium) by [theoclouds](https://modrinth.com/user/theoclouds) * [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium) by [Asek3](https://modrinth.com/user/Asek3) * [Rubidium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium-extra) by [dimadencep](https://modrinth.com/user/dimadencep) * [Smooth Boot (Reloaded)](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-boot-reloaded) by [AbdElAziz](https://modrinth.com/user/AbdElAziz) * [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight-forge) by [spottedleaf](https://modrinth.com/user/spottedleaf) * [TexTrue's Rubidium Options ](https://modrinth.com/mod/textrues-rubidium-options) by [TexTrue](https://modrinth.com/user/TexTrue)
